comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v2.0/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

LGTM.

I was really hoping not to do another release on the 2.0 branch, though.

> I was really hoping not to do another release on the 2.0 branch, though.

Sorry, Matt! This one's on me.

Although I was checking if we test events in the apiv2 ones, and we do (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/test/apiv2/rest_api/test_rest_v1_0_0.py#L94). But the `rest_api` part seems to not be part of the CI...
@mheon Wishful thinking.  RHEL8.3 is still a ways off.
static build is down ... @cevich looks like an infra hiccup?

@vrothberg the most recent run on [the v2.0 branch was successful, including the static_build task](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5004158564564992).  I'm also seeing the error message change across you're re-runs of the task, so....and the re-run I just did passed just now.  I didn't write that task, and don't know how it works, but I would guess the problem was some kind of hiccup.
